environment.backend: ONNX Runtime GPU 1.17.0 (custom build in image), CUDAExecutionProvider
environment.tensorrt: TRT 8.6.1 present in image but python bindings unusable without LD_LIBRARY_PATH fix; engine conversion not attempted this session
environment.runtime: Docker Desktop 29.6.1, image shaoguo/faster_liveportrait:v3 (digest sha256:c2fb2b22c61594ca3c187cfcae514cd449135a1aee693b79f924998d394b378d) + derived drawface/flp:v3-x11 (X11 libs, colorama, LD_LIBRARY_PATH)
environment.camera: Intel RealSense 455 RGB via usbipd-win -> /dev/video4 (YUYV 640x480@30fps), mapped to /dev/video0 in container
environment.source_image: assets/source/character.png (512x512 RGB, hand-drawn pig, flattened from RGBA)

human_mode.detail: "No face detected in the this image" -> "no face ... exit!" with BOTH detectors. Model loading on CUDA succeeded; failure is source detection only.
human_mode.verdict: FAIL - cannot animate this hand-drawn source

runs.name: side-by-side (paste_back off)
runs.note: VRAM is shared with Windows apps on WSL2; per-process attribution unavailable, deltas are upper bounds

animal_mode.latency_estimate_ms: ~150-165 end-to-end (camera ~33ms @30fps + inference ~120ms + display); not instrumented, estimate only

expression_response.wink_left_right_independent: not evaluable - face region too distorted
expression_response.blink_stability: not evaluable - face region too distorted
expression_response.mouth_open: motion visibly transfers but shape collapses
expression_response.head_pose: transfers, but drags/smears the whole head region

animal_mode.identity_preservation: POOR - entire head smeared/deformed (see user's screenshot); hand-drawn line art is out-of-distribution for the photo-trained warping model
animal_mode.body_background_preservation: GOOD with --paste_back (body, shorts, paper background intact)
animal_mode.artifacts: severe warping/smearing of head+ears, ghosting streaks above head
animal_mode.verdict: Detects and animates, but output quality unusable for this source (user-confirmed on live webcam)

decision.rule: CLAUDE.md Phase 3: fallback only if both modes fail to detect or drawing collapses badly
decision.outcome: Condition met (human: no source detection; animal: severe collapse). User approved Phase 5 MediaPipe sprite fallback on 2026-07-10.
decision.next: Phase 5: MediaPipe Face Landmarker -> blendshapes -> sprite compositing over the original drawing (100% style preservation)

privacy: No webcam frames saved. Upstream-written driving-motion pkl (results/) deleted after each run.
